description_long: This coupe car features an aggressive, sporty design with a prominent rear spoiler, wide fenders, and a low-slung body. The front end is equipped with a reinforced bumper, grille guard, and additional protective bars, suggesting a racing or rally-inspired build. The hood and rear window are fitted with louvered covers, while the side profile reveals two doors, aerodynamic side skirts, and large alloy wheels. The rear showcases a wide stance, dual exhausts, and a detailed diffuser, emphasizing performance. The car's surface appears to be finished in a matte or semi-gloss gray, with some yellow accents on the protective elements. The overall build and features indicate a high-performance coupe, likely designed for both speed and durability in urban or competitive environments.
description: A high-performance, gray coupe car with a large rear spoiler, reinforced bumpers, and louvered covers, designed for speed and durability. It features two doors, wide fenders, and yellow-accented protective elements.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large spoiler, louvered rear window, wide fenders, and dual exhausts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door coupe profile, aerodynamic side skirts, and alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the reinforced bumper, grille guard, hood louvers, and yellow-accented protective bars.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the coupe silhouette, spoiler, and detailed wheel design.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
